name: pos-clock-in-out
description: Clock in/clock out system for POS with time tracking and timesheet management
author: POS System

showClockInPromptOnLogin.description: Show clock in prompt when user logs in

showClockOutPromptOnLogout.description: Show clock out prompt when user logs out

autoClockInOnLogin.description: Automatically clock in when user logs in (no prompt)

autoClockOutOnLogout.description: Automatically clock out when user logs out (no prompt)

requireClockOutBeforeClockIn.description: Require clock out before allowing new clock in

allowManualClockInOut.description: Allow users to manually clock in/out from timesheet page

enableTimesheetEditing.description: Enable admins and managers to edit timesheets
